title: Verify Content Locking for Paused/Cancelled Trials
description: Ensure that once a trial is no longer active (paused or cancelled), the content sections within the Trial Corner are disabled.
preconditions: User is on the Trial Corner page.

steps.description: 1. Pause the trial via the 'Pause Trial' button.
4. Try to click on a piece of content.

expected_result: The content sections (Engagement, Trending, etc.) appear visually locked or greyed out. Clicking on content does not navigate the user or play any media.
